news.title: See the winning 2026 Images of Research
news.summary_en: This year’s winners span punk culture, a spider cadaver and a copper mine in Ecuador.

news.title: Student ventures take center stage at UIC’s 2026 Blaze Venture Challenge
news.summary_en: Nearly 80 students participated in UIC’s campuswide pitch competition for early-stage, student-led ventures.

news.title: UIC scientists develop promising therapy for deadly lung condition
news.summary_en: New molecule restores lung function in acute respiratory distress syndrome.

news.title: Meet UIC’s 2025-26 Rising Stars and Distinguished Researchers
news.summary_en: Annual awards honor 14 university researchers, staff for excellence, innovation and impact.
